title: A NAI, A GAMLA LOTE AH

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A nai, a gamla lote ah,
Ante min khin zo ta hi;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong ngai in an nei Topa;
An lak hun a khen ma in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sun kim ciang a hi zongin;
Hong kuan sak lai in nitak zong,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: lung damin na ciah ding hi.
